payload.requestText: What is the capital of France?
payload.instruction: First echo this request, then answer it on the next visit of the same node.

payload.echoText: What is the capital of France?
payload.handoff: Revisit the same node once more and answer from this echoed text.

payload.echoText: What is the capital of France?
payload.finalAnswer: The capital of France is Paris.
payload.memoryNote: This second visit represents the same node continuing after its earlier echo.

payload.summary: The reusable worker echoed the request on its first visit and returned the answer on its second visit.
payload.echoText: What is the capital of France?
payload.finalAnswer: The capital of France is Paris.
notes: Distinct step ids revisit the same reusable node registry entry.
The answer step inherits the backend session from echo-request and swaps to the answer prompt variant.
Live backend session continuity still depends on the configured backend returning a reusable session id.
